title: FastAPI Overview
text: FastAPI is a modern Python web framework for building APIs with validation, async handlers, and automatic docs.

title: RAG Overview
text: RAG systems combine retrieval with generation so answers stay grounded in external knowledge.

title: Vector Search
text: Vector databases enable fast similarity search over embedded document chunks.

title: Caching Guide
text: Caching reduces latency and API costs significantly. Exact caches and semantic caches both matter in production.

title: Rate Limiting
text: Rate limiting protects a shared RAG service from burst traffic and abusive clients.

title: Observability
text: Production observability means tracing retrieval, generation, latency, token usage, and cache hit rate.
